item.title: Red, White & Blue Dodge Vipers
item.description: A collection of Dodge Vipers in patriotic colors celebrates the iconic American performance car. The video showcases their bold styling and powerful presence. Which Viper color would you choose?

media:content.media:title: Red, White & Blue Dodge Vipers
media:content.media:description: A collection of Dodge Vipers in patriotic colors celebrates the iconic American performance car. The video showcases their bold styling and powerful presence. Which Viper color would you choose?

item.title: 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic at Klairmont Kollections
item.description: A rare 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic is featured, highlighting its innovative styling and place in automotive history. The video explores the design elements that made this classic far ahead of its time. What classic design do you admire most?

media:content.media:title: 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic at Klairmont Kollections
media:content.media:description: A rare 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic is featured, highlighting its innovative styling and place in automotive history. The video explores the design elements that made this classic far ahead of its time. What classic design do you admire most?

item.title: 1966 Pontiac GTO | IT IS A GAS
item.description: A closer look at a 1966 Pontiac GTO, one of the most recognizable American muscle cars of its era. The video explores its design, performance, and enduring appeal among enthusiasts. What is your favorite classic GTO feature?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Pontiac GTO | IT IS A GAS
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a 1966 Pontiac GTO, one of the most recognizable American muscle cars of its era. The video explores its design, performance, and enduring appeal among enthusiasts. What is your favorite classic GTO feature?

item.title: 1965 Corvette Convertible Survivor
item.description: A well-preserved 1965 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible is showcased, highlighting its original character, timeless styling, and survivor status. The video takes a closer look at what makes this classic sports car special. Would you preserve it or restore it?

media:content.media:title: 1965 Corvette Convertible Survivor
media:content.media:description: A well-preserved 1965 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible is showcased, highlighting its original character, timeless styling, and survivor status. The video takes a closer look at what makes this classic sports car special. Would you preserve it or restore it?

item.title: 1964 Dodge Polara 500 Ramcharger
item.description: A spotlight on a 1964 Dodge Polara 500 Ramcharger, showcasing its distinctive styling, performance heritage, and classic Mopar appeal. The video explores the features that make this vintage muscle car memorable. What stands out most about this classic Dodge?

media:content.media:description: A spotlight on a 1964 Dodge Polara 500 Ramcharger, showcasing its distinctive styling, performance heritage, and classic Mopar appeal. The video explores the features that make this vintage muscle car memorable. What stands out most about this classic Dodge?

item.title: The Boss of the Ford Mustangs
item.description: A look at the 1969 Boss 302, a standout in Ford Mustang history. This showcase highlights the car’s place in the lineup and its distinctive features. What makes the Boss 302 such a memorable Mustang?
